result: The raw survey datasets were successfully cleaned and preprocessed. The process involved loading specific columns from seven tab-delimited files (Ages 14, 17, 18, 19, 20, 25, and 32), merging them by NSID, and harmonizing the 'economic activity' construct across waves into both collapsed (ecoact) and detailed adult (ecoactadu) versions. Missing values were standardized to codes -1, -2, -3, -8, and -9 as per the instructions. All harmonized variables were converted to factors. The final cleaned dataset containing NSID and the age-specific economic activity variables was saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
